---
title: "EDA"
author: "Junxiu"
date: "2026-02-28"
output: html_document
---

## Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
library(skimr)
library(naniar)
library(data.table)
```

## File path

```{r}
# phenotype
pheno_file1 <- file.path("data", "phenotype",
                         "CMS challenge Scotland 22G BE20041B sample IDs_with PCR11102022.xlsx")
pheno_file2 <- file.path("data", "phenotype",
                         "Data - CMS MOWI genetics project Scotland.xlsx")

# pedigree
ped_file <- file.path("data", "pedigree",
                      "pedigree22G_CMSSalmoStrong.txt")

# genotype
bed_file <- file.path("data", "genotype",
                      "2022CMSGeno_SalmoStrong.bed")
bim_file <- sub("\\.bed$", ".bim", bed_file)
fam_file <- sub("\\.bed$", ".fam", bed_file)
```

```{r}
excel_sheets(pheno_file1)
excel_sheets(pheno_file2)

```
